ui.hero.sub: Vozen reads your Discord chat out loud with natural neural voices — in 35 languages, with games, laughter and a core that's free forever.
ui.hear.title: Press play. That's a real Vozen voice.
ui.hear.sub: Preview every engine. Piper is free; Kokoro unlocks with Vozen Plus or Premium.
ui.feat.title: Everything your server needs
ui.feat.sub: One bot. Every voice feature you wished Discord had — and the core is free forever.
ui.feat.1.d: Pick a channel and Vozen reads every message out loud. Set it up once with /setup.
ui.feat.2.d: Every member picks their own voice from 35 languages — Google or a local neural engine.
ui.feat.3.d: Uses your chosen voice by default. Optional per-message detection is enabled with /voice detection on; ! and CAPS add emphasis.
ui.feat.4.d: Guess the language, spelling bees, Wordle, reflex duels — with a server leaderboard.
ui.feat.5.d: Greets people who join — without repeating itself — wishes happy birthday, tells jokes, answers the magic 8-ball, and tracks your server's top speakers.
ui.feat.6.d: Blocklists, rate limits, an anti-spam filter that mutes flooded messages, role gating, opt-out and a kill-switch. You stay in control.
ui.feat.7.d: Robot, echo, deep, chipmunk, radio, demon… your messages, transformed. Two effects free, all eight with Premium.
ui.feat.8.d: €3.99/month unlocks Kokoro and the server-wide extras. The essential Piper-powered core stays free.
ui.feat.9.d: All of Vozen's code is public on GitHub. Audit it, learn from it, or open a PR — no secrets, no spyware.
ui.lang.title: One server, every language.
ui.lang.sub: Vozen speaks 35+ languages. Everyone picks their own voice — Portuguese, English, Japanese, Arabic and more — with the names shown in their own language.
ui.lang.t3: Voice names localized to each user
ui.games.title: Play it out loud.
ui.games.sub: 16 minigames built for voice: a turn-based word chain in your language (Vozen reads each word aloud), guess the spoken language, decode super-fast speech, spelling bees, reflex duels, plus Wordle, hangman, tic-tac-toe and chess on real graphical boards. Every server keeps a leaderboard.
ui.games.t3: Vozen announces the winner out loud
ui.setup.title: Ready in 30 seconds
ui.setup.1.d: Add Vozen to your server with one click.
ui.setup.2.d: Vozen hops into your voice channel.
ui.setup.3.d: Write a message — and hear it out loud.
ui.cmd.title: Simple slash commands
ui.cmd.sub: Use /cast to assign a random theme role to everyone in your voice call and hear the result.
ui.price.title: Free core. Fair Premium.
ui.price.sub: The Piper-powered core stays free. Premium unlocks Kokoro, Google HD and the extras that use more compute.
ui.price.choose.title: Choose who gets the upgrade.
ui.price.choose.sub: Keep the core free, upgrade yourself, or unlock Premium for everyone in your server.
ui.price.free.pitch: All the essentials. No card, no trial.
ui.price.plus.pitch: Your premium voice perks follow you into every server.
ui.price.pro.pitch: Unlock the full Vozen experience for everyone in your community.

ui.price.compare.sub: The complete plan comparison, without surprises.

ui.claim.lost: Lost the receipt? Ko-fi emailed it to you when you paid — find that email and open your order from there.
ui.claim.help.title: Get your pass activated
ui.claim.help.step1: In that Ko-fi email, press “Go to your order”. Copy the address of the page that opens and paste it in the box above — that activates your pass right away.
ui.claim.help.step2: No luck? Tell us the email you used on Ko-fi (it's on your receipt) and we'll activate your pass by hand.
ui.claim.help.refPasted: That's the Ref from your receipt — it can't activate a pass, and we can't look it up. Tell us the email you used on Ko-fi instead.
ui.claim.help.notEmail: That doesn't look like an email. Copy the one you used on Ko-fi — it's on your receipt.
ui.claim.help.sent: Got it! We'll activate your pass by hand shortly — it will show up on this page.
ui.claim.help.sendError: Couldn't send that. Copy the message below and send it to us on the support server.
ui.claim.help.stillStuck: Still stuck? Talk to us on the support server →

voice: How Vozen calls you out loud
Teach Vozen how to say a word (yours only)
fun: A short joke in any language
Vozen picks one option at random and says it
Randomly assign a themed role to everyone in your voice call, then say the results
admin: Greet people who join the call
Server-wide pronunciations for everyone (admin, 3 · 50 with Premium)

faq: Yes — the core stays free: 38 Piper voices in 35 languages, auto-read, greetings, most games and every admin control. Kokoro and Google HD are Premium voice engines; Plus unlocks them personally and server Premium unlocks them for that server.

Kokoro neural and Google HD voice engines, all 8 voice effects, 24/7 in-call, 50 personal pronunciations, /rizz and the premium games (Word Chain, Wordle, Chess). Server Premium also includes live voice transcription. €3.99/month covers 3 servers, or €7.99/month covers 8; annual saves about 20%. Vozen Plus (€1.99/month) gives the personal perks on any server.
How do I add Vozen to my server?
Click "Add to Discord", pick your server (you need Manage Server), and run /setup. That's it.
35 languages with 38 neural voices — Portuguese, English, Spanish, French, German, Japanese, Arabic, Russian and many more, each with a native voice.
Do I need to configure anything?
No. /setup does it in one step. After that, everything works with sensible defaults — you can fine-tune later with /config.
Can everyone have a different voice?
Yes. Each member sets their own voice and language with /voice set. That voice is the default; optional per-message detection can be enabled with /voice detection on.
Piper, Kokoro or Google HD — which voice engine?

Piper is the free local engine. Kokoro neural and Google HD require Vozen Plus for you or Vozen Premium on the server. Switch anytime with /voice set; expired access automatically returns to the free engine.
How do I turn features off?
Everything is toggleable via /config — the greeting, auto-read, who-said announcements, the anti-spam filter, and more. There's also a full kill-switch.
